headline: Bolivia Weighs $1B USDT Amid Dollar Shortage Crisis

article.title: Bolivia mulls recognizing USDT as payment currency amid dollar shortage
article.summary: As foreign currency reserves remain under pressure, Bolivia is considering a framework to let the world’s largest stablecoin be used for payments, savings and trade.

headline: Fusion Firm Soars 20% in Wall Street Debut

article.summary: General Fusion Group Ltd. surged in its first day of trading after merging with a blank-check firm, a sign of investors’ interest in the world’s first publicly listed nuclear fusion company.

headline: Trump Reimposes Iran Sanctions, 20% Hormuz Surcharge Looms

article.title: Trump Restarts Iran Blockade as US Plans 20% Hormuz Charge
article.summary: President Donald Trump reinstated the US blockade of Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz and demanded a 20% reimbursement on all other cargo shipped through the waterway.
